VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.name: Actor Token Setup
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.hint: Open a quick image setup dialog after creating an actor.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.descrip: Adds a focused setup popup for actor portrait, prototype token image, and optional Image Hover art after actor creation.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.ActorPo: Shown in actor lists and on the actor sheet.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.TokenIm: Used by the actor prototype token when dragged to the scene.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.HoverIm: Optional compatibility field for the Image Hover module.
